identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Architectural precision with Digital utility
Content is King: The Quotation is the hero
Negative Space: Luxury is defined by what isn't there
Contrast: Stark Black & White for maximum clarity

rules: Black is for Action, White is for Canvas

left_quotation.style: shadow-2xl shadow-black/5 border border-border/40 min-h-[297mm] aspect-[210/297] mx-auto

right_selection.style: border-l border-border h-screen sticky top-0 overflow-y-auto p-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-6 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-medium transition-all

cards.item: bg-white border border-border/60 hover:border-primary/100 transition-colors cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-4 flex flex-col gap-2 group rounded-none

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-none border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: h-10 px-2 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&>[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background (optional)
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for dropdowns, shadow-xl for the main paper sheet

images.description: White sheer curtains - use for subtle background or empty state
Modern blue staircase - use for login/welcome screen if needed
Modern armchair - use for 'Furniture' category placeholder

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (already installed). Preferred icons: LayoutTemplate, Plus, Trash2, FileDown, GripVertical, Upload

implementation_instructions.drag_and_drop: Use HTML5 Drag and Drop API. Add 'draggable' attribute to items. Handle 'onDragStart', 'onDragOver', 'onDrop'. Visual feedback is key.
implementation_instructions.pdf_export: Use window.print() with specific @media print CSS. Hide the right panel and UI buttons during print. Ensure the left panel scales to fit A4.
implementation_instructions.state_management: Use React Context or simple State for the quotation data. Structure: { sections: [{ id, title, items: [] }] }
implementation_instructions.csv_parsing: Use simple string splitting for CSV parsing. No heavy libraries needed.
implementation_instructions.responsive: On mobile, stack the panels. Right panel (Selection) goes to the BOTTOM or becomes a Drawer/Modal. Left panel (Quotation) takes full width.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no rounded-xl borders everywhere. Keep it sharp and architectural.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should have a subtle scale or border-color change on hover.
Data-TestID: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'add-section-btn', 'export-pdf-btn').
Sonner: Use 'sonner' for all notifications (e.g., 'Item added', 'Quotation saved').
